description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a simple, minimalist design, featuring a flat top surface and sturdy side panels. The right side of the desk includes a vertical cabinet door, likely concealing storage space or a compartment for a computer tower. The left side is open, supported by a single panel, providing legroom for the user. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the desk a warm, natural appearance. There is a small circular cutout on the left side panel, possibly for cable management. The overall construction appears solid and functional, suitable for both work and study environments.
description: A rectangular wooden desk with a flat top, right-side cabinet door, and visible wood grain. The design is simple and functional, with a cable management hole on the left panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat desktop, open left leg space, and a right-side cabinet door.
description_view_1: Right side view displaying the solid side panel and the depth of the desk.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the back of the cabinet and the open left side, with a visible cable management hole.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the solid left panel and the overall length of the desk.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the open leg space and cabinet door on the right, intended for sitting and working at the desk.
